status.description: Current status of the payroll cycle

startAt.description: Start date of the payroll period

endAt.description: End date of the payroll period

customPeriodStartAt.description: Start date of the custom period

customPeriodEndAt.description: End date of the custom period

reviewStartAt.description: Start date of the review period

approvalStartAt.description: Start date of the approval period

approvedAt.description: Date when the payroll cycle was approved

approvedBy.description: User ID of the user who approved the payroll cycle

prorateType.description: Type of prorate used for the payroll cycle

salaryTypeCustomName.description: Custom name for the salary type

baseSalaryCustomName.description: Custom name for the base salary

salaryPerHourCustomName.description: Custom name for the salary per hour

compensableTimeCustomName.description: Custom name for the compensable time

hoursWorkedCustomName.description: Custom name for the hours worked

paidAbsencesCustomName.description: Custom name for the paid absences

createdAt.description: When the payroll cycle was created

updatedAt.description: When the payroll cycle was last updated
